title: namako pi ma musi
description:
A modpack for the "ma musi pi toki pona" Discord community.

kulupu namako ni li tawa "ma musi pi toki pona" lon ilo Siko.
body:
kulupu namako ni li tawa "ma musi pi toki pona" lon ilo Siko.
taso, jan ale li ken kepeken!

ijo pi mute lili li lon:
- namako suli la namako Create taso li lon
- kiwen pi pona lukin li lon
- ijo li lon tawa pona pilin
- ijo li musi tawa ma kulupu

kulupu ni li pona lon ni:
- jan li wile e namako lili
- jan li pali e tomo pona la ona li pilin pona
- jan li wile ala e namako mute pi ken sama

----

This pack is for the "ma musi pi toki pona" Discord community. However, everyone is welcome to use it!

It's a mostly minimal pack:
- Create is the only large content mod
- It contains a lot of decorations and building options
- QoL and "just for fun" stuff is included
- It includes some fun community-oriented mods

This pack is good when:
- People want a pack with few mods
- They enjoy building and decoration
- They don't want tons of mods that do the same thing
